planning_note: Approximate static planning range only. Real quotes depend on lane, backhaul, capacity, fuel, tolls, season, equipment and urgency.
Approximate planning range. Market rates vary strongly by lane and carrier availability.

region_or_scenario: UK/EU cross-border standard FTL excluding ferry/tunnel and customs
planning_note: Use as base only; add Channel crossing, customs/admin, ferry/tunnel and border buffers.

region_or_scenario: Europe to/from North Africa road + ferry corridor base trucking cost excluding ferry/customs
planning_note: High uncertainty. Must add ferry, port waiting, customs broker, bilateral permit/admin and border delay cost.

region_or_scenario: Reefer / temperature-controlled trailer surcharge over dry van
planning_note: Depends on temperature range, validation, energy, cleaning, availability and pharma/food requirements.

region_or_scenario: Tanker / silo tanker specialized equipment surcharge
planning_note: Depends on product compatibility, cleaning certificate, discharge method and carrier specialization.

region_or_scenario: Abnormal/special movement heavy-haul surcharge over standard FTL
planning_note: Can exceed this range for engineered route surveys, escorts, police, bridge checks, night moves or modular trailers.
Use live diesel data where possible. EU Weekly Oil Bulletin is the official source for EU petroleum product prices.
Highly country/road/emissions/axle dependent. Static range only; live toll calculators required for quote-grade output.
Includes salary/allowance planning approximation; varies by country, employer, overnight, and collective agreements.

region_or_scenario: Customs brokerage / export-import declaration per crossing
planning_note: Depends on declaration type, commodity complexity, documents and broker pricing.

region_or_scenario: Europe/North Africa customs brokerage and port admin planning allowance
planning_note: High variance by country, importer readiness, broker, commodity, port congestion and inspection.

region_or_scenario: Truck waiting/delay cost at border, customs, ferry, loading site
planning_note: Apply to ROAD-F buffer hours. Real demurrage/waiting terms depend on carrier contract.

region_or_scenario: LeShuttle Freight vehicle <7.5m each way example
planning_note: Official listed starting rate; excludes electricity value adjustment and peak days. Use live operator price for quote.

region_or_scenario: LeShuttle Freight vehicle >13m each way example
planning_note: Official listed starting rate; excludes electricity value adjustment and peak days. Use live operator price for quote.

region_or_scenario: Europe/North Africa truck ferry planning allowance
planning_note: Very lane/season/equipment dependent. Must be quoted live by ferry operator/freight forwarder.

region_or_scenario: Abnormal/special movement permit/admin fee planning allowance
planning_note: Excludes engineering studies, route survey, escorts and police costs. Can be much higher for heavy haulage.
Country and route dependent. Often mandatory for oversized/heavy movements.

region_or_scenario: ADR dangerous goods surcharge over standard road freight
planning_note: Depends on class, quantity, packaging, tunnel restrictions, driver certificate and carrier acceptance.
